critiques.finding: Tab panel roots (ai_RNbBHYVG … ai_RNbBHYZD) render as empty hidden shells with no inner IR entities; acceptable for SET-01 chrome-only scope but users see blank content until SET-02+ lands panel bodies.
critiques.alternative: Mount downstream tab components as children of each SettingsTabPanel or document explicit deferral in coverage when panels are toggled.

critiques.finding: SHELL-09 brownfield prototype settings widgets inside ai_RNbBHYUr were replaced by tab chrome and empty panels; working profile/subscription UI is gone until SET-02+ restores panel content.
critiques.alternative: Retain prototype panel bodies inside respective panel bubble ids during SET-01 gap-fill, then migrate IR fidelity in SET-02+ without user-visible regression.
evidence: cursor-impl-cycle/output/coverage/SHELL-09-settings-page-shell.json — AC-3 noted prototype UI inside ai_RNbBHYUr

critiques.finding: SettingsTabBar adds responsive Tailwind overrides (flex-wrap gap-1, border-0 on buttons) atop Group_tab_bar_ / Button_tab_* classes; minor layout delta from IR fixed tab bar though layout_notes allow wrap on narrow viewports.
critiques.alternative: Reconcile fit_width fluid semantics from IR presentation when responsive polish pass is scheduled.

critiques.finding: useSettingsTabStore is local React hook state per SettingsMain mount, not a shared store or explicit SETTINGS_TAB_CUSTOM_STATE_KEY binding; naming may mislead if URL/deep-link tab sync is needed later.
critiques.alternative: Lift tab state to Settings.tsx context or sync slug to query param if navigation must preserve active tab across remounts.
evidence: frontend/src/lib/settings/settingsTabStub.ts — SETTINGS_TAB_CUSTOM_STATE_KEY exported but unused in store
